name: PacketVault
description: A high-performance packet parser and analysis tool built in Python. Dissects live network packets, highlighting security anomalies and signature matches.

name: ShadowScanner
description: Automated command-line vulnerability scanner targeting web applications for OWASP Top 10 exploits, focusing on XSS, SQLi, and path traversal detection.

name: KeyLock Cryptanalysis
description: A cryptographic validation framework demonstrating AES and RSA implementation vulnerabilities. Analyzes weak key generations and IV reuse errors.
